composio_raw.name: Datadog
composio_raw.description: Datadog offers monitoring, observability, and security for cloud-scale applications, unifying metrics, logs, and traces to help teams detect issues and optimize performance

llm_raw.description: A comprehensive monitoring, security, and observability platform for cloud-scale applications, infrastructure, and services.
llm_raw.notes: Datadog provides an extensive REST API for almost all platform features, including logs, metrics, monitors, and security tools. It also offers an official MCP server for agent integration.
